DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS AND COMPANION FORM INTERROGATORY; FOR SANCTIONS; FOR APPOINTMENT OF DISCOVERY MASTER AT DEFENDANT'S EXPENSE IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. AS TO ALL RESPONSES, DISCOVERY IS CONTINUING IS AN INADEQUATE RESPONSE AND ORDERED STRICKEN. AS TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSION NOS. 1, 11, AND 14, THE OBJECTIONS ARE ORDERED STRICKEN. THE RESPONSES ARE OTHERWISE SUFFICIENT. AS TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSION NOS. 2, 3, 4, 8, 10, 13, 18, AND 19 THE OBJECTIONS TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION AND TO INTERROGATORY 17.1 ARE ORDERED STRICKEN. THE RESPONSES TO 17.1 ARE INADEQUATE, AND DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER. AS TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSION NOS. 5, 6, 7, 9, AND 12, THE OBJECTIONS ARE ORDERED STRICKEN. THE RESPONSES MAY BE OTHERWISE ADEQUATE. AS TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSION NO. 15, THE RESPONSE TO 17.1 IS INADEQUATE. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER. AS DEFENDANT BELIEVES THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ARE VAGUE AND AMBIGUOUS, THE RESPONSES SHALL SET FORTH THE DEFENDANT'S UNDERSTANDINGS OF THE QUESTIONS IN MAKING THE RESPONSE. FURTHER RESPONSES SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
